messages.body: Finish task 1 now: ensure your branch is committed, include delegation evidence and verification evidence, transition task 1 to completed, set status idle, and report final summary to leader.

Clarification: file edits inside the repo are allowed and expected for this task. Only real live orders and Gist upload are forbidden. Continue task 1 to a finish using safe repo changes, verification, then transition to completed.

You are now unblocked. Finalize task 1: use your existing repo changes and integrated commits, transition task 1 to completed, and include the required delegation evidence plus verification evidence in the result. Do not add live orders or Gist upload.
